title: PlaceRef Contract
description: Neutral spatial and file-location reference contract for uDOS-core. Defines canonical PlaceRef and related fields for artifact and file attachment.

place_ref.description: Canonical PlaceRef string. Format: ANCHOR:SPACE:LAYER-CELL[-Z] or short form L{Layer}-{Cell}[-Z{z}].

anchor.description: Domain anchor (e.g., EARTH, GAME, BODY:MARS, SKY, GALAXY).
